title: index
text:
I am a student from Singapore Institution of Technology (SIT) studying Applied Artificial Intelligence. I am currently in my first year of study.
I am interested in learning more about Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. I am also interested in learning more about the different types of programming languages and how they can be used to create different applications.



Image of the Titanic

title: index
text: Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see https://quarto.org.

title: index
text:
Running Code
When you click the Render button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

1 + 1

[1] 2


You can add options to executable code like this


[1] 4


The echo: false option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

title: hobby
text: Whenever I am free, i would like to play first-person shooter (FPS) games. Like counter strike 2 and Valorant.
